creator: val@packett.cool
text:
Created attachment 210634
crystal0321.patch

- a libevent 2.1.11 fix landed upstream, dropping the patch
- finally LLVM 9 works great! :)
  - optimized mode with debuginfo no longer trips LLVM assertions it seems, so we can drop that note
- I'm tired of building for FreeBSD 11, hopefully everyone is fine with IGNORE_FreeBSD_11
